faqs.question: What types of cockroaches are common in Greenburgh homes?
faqs.answer: Greenburgh residents most commonly encounter German cockroaches in kitchens and bathrooms, American cockroaches in basements and sewers, and Oriental cockroaches in damp areas. Our technicians are trained to identify the specific species infesting your property and apply targeted treatments that are most effective for that particular type of roach.

faqs.question: Do you use safe treatments for homes with children and pets in Greenburgh?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We prioritize the safety of your family and pets while effectively eliminating cockroaches. We offer eco-friendly and low-toxicity treatment options, including gel baits, targeted applications, and integrated pest management approaches. Our technicians will discuss all treatment options with you and ensure proper precautions are taken during and after service.
